hero.layer1sub: Private residences above the rooftops of Florence
hero.layer2sub: The Duomo. The Ponte Vecchio. The Arno.

about.p1: Discover a charming 200 sqm residence, recently renovated, in the heart of the city. Three designer bedrooms with perfect soundproofing, three luxury bathrooms, and a panoramic terrace with views across the monuments of Florence.
about.p2: The living room is entirely clad in fine Carrara marble, flooded with light through expansive glass panels. A sculptural fireplace creates an atmosphere of intimate elegance. Every window frames a city monument — transforming the view into a work of art that shifts with the light.
about.p3: Surrounded by the flagship boutiques of Louis Vuitton, Gucci, Ferragamo, Valentino and Tiffany — this is Florence at its most prestigious.

gallery.subtitle: Eight perspectives on life above Florence.

rooms.name: Master Suite
rooms.desc: King bed with silk linens, en-suite marble bathroom with freestanding bath, direct terrace access.

rooms.name: Junior Suite
rooms.desc: Queen bed (152×203cm), soundproofed walls, crystal sconces, views over the Florentine rooftops.

rooms.name: Classic Room
rooms.desc: Queen bed, warm textured walls, designer furnishings, dedicated workspace with city-facing window.

location.title: The most prestigious address in Florence.
location.body: On the 4th floor of a historic palazzo in the most sought-after street of the Florentine centre — steps from the Uffizi, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Duomo. Walking distance to everything. Surrounded by the great names of Italian luxury.

footer.sub: Private inquiries welcome. Each reservation is handled personally by Daniela and Andrea.
footer.hostNote: Hosted by Daniela · Speaks English, Italian, Russian
footer.legalExtra: Check-in 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM · Check-out by 10:00 AM

whatsapp.message: Hello, I'd like to inquire about Florence VIP residences.
